<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
The error is "Out of range value for column 'diem_danh_gia_nang_luc'". The column is DECIMAL(7,2), meaning it can store values from -99999.99 to 99999.99. But the error suggests the value being inserted is out of range.

The likely issue is that `diem_danh_gia_nang_luc` is a string (JSON) or an empty string `""`, which can't be converted to a valid DECIMAL. The `|| null` fallback on line 728 would return `""` if the value is an empty string (because `""` is truthy in JS... wait, no, `"" || null` returns `null`). 

Actually, if it's undefined it should return null. But if it's something like a string that's not a valid number, or a very large number, it would fail. The real culprit is probably that the frontend is sending `diem_danh_gia_nang_luc` as a string containing a number like "1500" or "30.5", and while DECIMAL(7,2) can handle those values, something about the data type mismatch is causing the out-of-range error.

Looking at the INSERT statement, the value being passed is `diem_danh_gia_nang_luc || null`. The issue is likely that `diem_danh_gia_nang_luc` is either an empty string, null, or some other value that evaluates to false, causing the `|| null` fallback to trigger, but then something downstream is rejecting the null value or the data type conversion is failing.

Let me trace through the actual flow: the column is DECIMAL(7,2) which should handle null values fine, so either the column definition changed and no longer allows nulls, or the incoming value is something like a string "null" or "undefined" that can't be converted to a number. I'm also wondering if the issue is that `diem_danh_gia_nang_luc` is coming through as an array or object from the frontend instead of a simple number.

Let me check the table schema to see what the actual column definition is.

## Investigation Results

### 1. Application Detail Page (Trang Chi tiet ho so)

**File**: `C:/Users/Admin/source/repos/DoAnTuyenSinh/DoAnTuyenSinh/src/admin/pages/QuanLyHoSo.jsx`

There is no dedicated "Chi tiet" route/page. The application detail view is a **full-screen modal** rendered inline within `QuanLyHoSo.jsx` (lines 606-762). It is triggered by clicking the eye icon on any application row (`handleViewDetails` at line 259). The modal displays the header:

```jsx
// Line 632
<h3 className={`text-2xl font-bold ${modalText}`}>
  Chi tiet ho so - {selectedApplication.ho_ten || selectedApplication.studentName}
</h3>
```

The modal shows two columns:
- **Left**: Personal info (name, email, phone, CCCD) and academic info (major, admission method, GPA)
- **Right**: Attachments (thumbnail grid) and processing info (submission date, status)

### 2. Avatar / Photo Field in Registration

**File**: `C:/Users/Admin/source/repos/DoAnTuyenSinh/DoAnTuyenSinh/src/pages/DangKyXetTuyen.jsx`

**Finding: There is NO avatar/photo field in DangKyXetTuyen.jsx at all.**

The form state (lines 37-47) contains only:
```js
const [form, setForm] = useState({
  ho_ten: "", ngay_sinh: "", cccd: "", sdt: "", email: "",
  noi_hoc_12: "", truong_thpt: "", ten_lop_12: "", dia_chi: "",
});
```

There is a `fileHoSo` state (line 60) for file uploads, but it is used for **"Hinh hoc ba va CCCD"** -- i.e., the transcript and ID card images as attachments -- not a personal avatar/photo. The file input section (lines 1151-1205) is labeled "Hinh hoc ba va CCCD" and has an `accept="image/*,.pdf"` filter.

The API submission (lines 266-285) sends the form data as JSON -- no avatar field is included:

```js
const applicationData = {
  ...form,
  nganh_id: parseInt(nganhIds[0]) || null,
  nganh_ids: nganhIds.filter(Boolean).map((id) => parseInt(id)),
  phuong_thuc_xet_tuyen: phuongThucXetTuyen,
  user_id: localStorage.getItem("userId") || null,
};
// ... then sends scores depending on method
```

**Avatar exists in the `users` table**, not in `applications`. The backend has:
- `users.avatar` column (updated via `PUT /api/user/update-avatar`, line 2974-2975)
- Separate upload flow: `POST /api/user/upload-avatar` then `PUT /api/user/update-avatar`

---

### 3. Notification System

#### NotificationBell Component

**File**: `C:/Users/Admin/source/repos/DoAnTuyenSinh/DoAnTuyenSinh/src/components/NotificationBell.jsx`

The bell button (lines 27-50) displays:
- Red/pink badge with `unreadCount` (line 36-40)
- Green pulsing dot when SSE `isConnected` (line 41-43)
- Yellow animated dot when `isReconnecting` (line 44-46)
- Red static dot when disconnected (line 47-49)

The dropdown panel (lines 52-131) renders each notification with type-based color coding, unread state, mark-as-read on click, "mark all as read" button, and "clear all" button.

#### NotificationContext (SSE Client)

**File**: `C:/Users/Admin/source/repos/DoAnTuyenSinh/DoAnTuyenSinh/src/contexts/NotificationContext.jsx`

- Connects to `EventSource` at `/api/sse/events` (line 39) for admin/staff roles only
- Listens for `new_application` event (line 56), parses it, prepends to notifications list, increments `unreadCount`, and fires a toast
- Auto-reconnects with exponential backoff up to 10 retries (lines 84-91)
- Cleanup on unmount or when role changes (lines 98-121)

```js
// Lines 56-76: SSE event handler
es.addEventListener('new_application', (event) => {
    const data = JSON.parse(event.data);
    const notification = {
        id: data.id || Date.now(),
        title: 'Ho so moi',
        message: `Thi sinh ${data.candidateName || 'moi'} vua nop ho so`,
        type: 'new_application',
        ...
    };
    setNotifications(prev => [notification, ...prev].slice(0, 50));
    setUnreadCount(prev => prev + 1);
    toast.success(notification.title, { description: notification.message, duration: 5000 });
});
```

#### SSE Service (Backend Broadcast)

**File**: `C:/Users/Admin/source/repos/DoAnTuyenSinh/DoAnTuyenSinh/backend/services/sseService.js`

```js
broadcast(channelKey, eventName, data) {
    const clientSet = this.clients.get(channelKey);
    const message = `event: ${eventName}\ndata: ${JSON.stringify(data)}\n\n`;
    for (const res of clientSet) {
        if (!res.writableEnded) res.write(message);
    }
}
```

Broadcasts to the `'admin'` channel when a new application is submitted:

```js
// backend/index.js line 736
sseService.broadcast('admin', 'new_application', {
    id: result.insertId,
    candidateName: ho_ten || email,
    email: email,
    major: nganh_id,
    timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
});
```

The SSE endpoint at `GET /api/sse/events` (backend/index.js lines 68-94) routes clients to either `'admin'` channel or their `userId` channel based on role.

### 4. AdminLayout

---

### Critical Inconsistencies Found

**Issue 1: Avatar never stored with application, so detail page never shows it.**

The `applications` table INSERT (backend/index.js lines 708-729) does NOT include any avatar column. The table schema (found via ALTER statements at lines 2323-2339) only has columns for: `application_code, ho_ten, ngay_sinh, cccd, sdt, email, noi_hoc_12, truong_thpt, ten_lop_12, dia_chi, nganh_id, nganh_ids, phuong_thuc_xet_tuyen, khoi_thi, diem_thi_thpt, diem_danh_gia_nang_luc, diem_hk1, diem_ca_nam, user_id, status, created_at, updated_at`. No avatar field exists.

Meanwhile, `QuanLyHoSo.jsx` line 480-485 tries to display an avatar:
```jsx
{app.avatar || (app.user && app.user.avatar) ? (
  <img src={app.avatar || (app.user && app.user.avatar)} ... />
) : (
  <FaGraduationCap className="text-white text-lg" />
)}
```

And the backend `GET /api/admin/applications` query (lines 936-948) does a `LEFT JOIN nganh` only -- it does NOT join the `users` table and does NOT select any avatar. So `app.avatar` and `app.user` are always `undefined` in real mode.

The only place an avatar URL appears in any API response is:
- `GET /api/admin/recent-applications` (line 832) -- generates a `ui-avatars.com` placeholder: `avatar: \`https://ui-avatars.com/api/?name=${encodeURIComponent(app.ho_ten)}&background=3b82f6&color=fff\``
- `POST /api/auth/login` (line 187) -- returns `user.avatar` from the `users` table

**Issue 2: DangKyXetTuyen has no avatar upload, so even if you fix the detail page, there is nothing to show.**

The registration form does not collect or submit any avatar. If the intent is to show the candidate's photo in the admin detail view, the registration form first needs a photo upload field, and that URL needs to be stored either in the `applications` table or via a `JOIN` to the `users` table.

**Issue 3: fileHoSo is submitted as a single file, but displayed as multiple attachment thumbnails.**

The form has one `fileHoSo` state (single file), but the detail modal's attachment renderer (lines 699-714) expects `selectedApplication.attachments` as an array. The backend API (`POST /api/auth/apply`) does NOT handle file uploads at all -- it sends `applicationData` as JSON only. So `attachments` in the detail modal would only work in demo mode (where `DEMO_APPLICATIONS` provides the data).

    73→  useEffect(() => {
    74→    fetchApplications();
    75→  }, [statusFilter, majorFilter, debouncedSearchTerm]);
    76→
    77→  // Reset page when filters/search change
    78→  useEffect(() => {
    79→    setCurrentPage(1);
    80→  }, [statusFilter, majorFilter, debouncedSearchTerm]);
    81→
    82→  // Set filtered applications from API response
    83→  useEffect(() => {
    84→    setFilteredApplications(applications);
    85→  }, [applications]);
    86→
    87→  const fetchApplications = async () => {
    88→    try {
    89→      setLoading(true);
    90→      setError('');
    91→      setShowErrorBanner(false);
    92→
    93→      const isDemo = isDemoMode || localStorage.getItem("demoMode") === "true";
    94→
    95→      if (isDemo) {
    96→        if (!DEMO_APPLICATIONS || DEMO_APPLICATIONS.length === 0) {
    97→          const msg = "Demo data không có sẵn. Vui lòng thử lại.";
    98→          setErrorBannerMessage(msg);
    99→          setShowErrorBanner(true);
   100→          return;
   101→        }
   102→
   103→        await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 200));
   104→
   105→        let filteredData = [...DEMO_APPLICATIONS];
   106→
   107→        if (statusFilter !== 'all') {
   108→          filteredData = filteredData.filter(app => app.status === statusFilter);
   109→        }
   110→
   111→        if (majorFilter !== 'all') {
   112→          filteredData = filteredData.filter(app => app.major_name === majorFilter);
   113→        }
   114→
   115→        if (debouncedSearchTerm) {
   116→          const searchLower = debouncedSearchTerm.toLowerCase();
   117→          filteredData = filteredData.filter(app =>
   118→            (app.ho_ten || app.studentName || '').toLowerCase().includes(searchLower) ||
   119→            (app.email || '').toLowerCase().includes(searchLower) ||
   120→            (app.application_code || '').toLowerCase().includes(searchLower)
   121→          );
   122→        }
   123→
   124→        setApplications(filteredData);
   125→        setError('');
   126→        setLoading(false);
   127→        return;
   128→      }
   129→
   130→      const response = await axios.get('http://localhost:3001/api/admin/applications', {
   131→        params: {
   132→          status: statusFilter !== 'all' ? statusFilter : undefined,
   133→          major: majorFilter !== 'all' ? majorFilter : undefined,
   134→          search: debouncedSearchTerm || undefined
   135→        }
   136→      });
   137→
   138→      if (response.data.success) {
   139→        setApplications(response.data.data.applications);
   140→      } else {
   141→        setApplications([]);
   142→      }
   143→    } catch {
   144→      const msg = 'Không thể tải danh sách hồ sơ. Vui lòng kiểm tra kết nối server.';
   145→      setErrorBannerMessage(msg);
   146→      setShowErrorBanner(true);
   147→      setApplications([]);
   148→    } finally {
   149→      setLoading(false);
   150→    }
   151→  };
   152→
   153→  const fetchMajors = async () => {
   154→    try {
   155→      const isDemo = isDemoMode || localStorage.getItem("demoMode") === "true";
   156→
   157→      if (isDemo) {
   158→        if (DEMO_MAJORS && DEMO_MAJORS.length > 0) {
   159→          setMajors(DEMO_MAJORS.map(major => ({ name: major.ten_nganh })));
   160→        } else {
   161→          setMajors([
   162→            { name: "Công nghệ Thông tin" },
   163→            { name: "Quản trị Kinh doanh" },
   164→            { name: "Kế toán" },
   165→            { name: "Thiết kế Đồ họa" }
   166→          ]);
   167→        }
   168→        return;
   169→      }
   170→
   171→      const response = await axios.get('http://localhost:3001/api/auth/majors');
   172→      if (response.data.success) {
   173→        setMajors(response.data.data);
   174→      }
   175→    } catch {
   176→      setMajors([
   177→        { name: "Công nghệ Thông tin" },
   178→        { name: "Quản trị Kinh doanh" },
   179→        { name: "Kỹ thuật Cơ khí" },
   180→        { name: "Kế toán" }
   181→      ]);
   182→    }
   183→  };
   184→
   185→  const handleStatusChange = async (applicationId, newStatus) => {
   186→    try {
   187→      if (isDemoMode) {
   188→        setApplications(prev =>
   189→          prev.map(app =>
   190→            app.id === applicationId
   191→              ? { ...app, status: newStatus }
   192→              : app
   193→          )
   194→        );
   195→
   196→        if (selectedApplication && selectedApplication.id === applicationId) {
   197→          setSelectedApplication(prev => ({ ...prev, status: newStatus }));
   198→        }
   199→        toast.success('Trạng thái hồ sơ đã được cập nhật (Demo mode)');
   200→        return;
   201→      }
   202→
   203→      const response = await axios.put(`http://localhost:3001/api/admin/applications/${applicationId}/status`, {
   204→        status: newStatus
   205→      });
   206→
   207→      if (response.data.success) {
   208→        setApplications(prev =>
   209→          prev.map(app =>
   210→            app.id === applicationId
   211→              ? { ...app, status: newStatus }
   212→              : app
   213→          )
   214→        );
   215→
   216→        if (selectedApplication && selectedApplication.id === applicationId) {
   217→          setSelectedApplication(prev => ({ ...prev, status: newStatus }));
   218→        }
   219→      }
   220→    } catch {
   221→      const msg = 'Không thể cập nhật trạng thái hồ sơ';
   222→      setErrorBannerMessage(msg);
   223→      setShowErrorBanner(true);
   224→    }
   225→  };
   226→
   227→  const getStatusBadge = (status) => {
   228→    const statusConfig = {
   229→      pending: {
   230→        text: "Chờ xử lý",
   231→        light: "bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800",
   232→        dark: "bg-yellow-900/40 text-yellow-300",
   233→        icon: FaClock
   234→      },
   235→      approved: {
   236→        text: "Đã duyệt",
   237→        light: "bg-green-100 text-green-800",
   238→        dark: "bg-green-900/40 text-green-300",
   239→        icon: FaCheck
   240→      },
   241→      rejected: {
   242→        text: "Từ chối",
   243→        light: "bg-red-100 text-red-800",
   244→        dark: "bg-red-900/40 text-red-300",
   245→        icon: FaTimes
   246→      }
   247→    };
   248→    const config = statusConfig[status];
   249→    const colorClass = darkMode ? config.dark : config.light;
   250→    const Icon = config.icon;
   251→    return (
   252→      <span className={`px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-sm font-semibold flex items-center gap-2 ${colorClass}`}>
   253→        <Icon className="text-xs" />
   254→        {config.text}
   255→      </span>
   256→    );
   257→  };
   258→
   259→  const handleViewDetails = (application) => {
   260→    setSelectedApplication(application);
   261→    setShowDetailModal(true);
   262→  };
   263→
   264→  const getMajorColor = (major) => {
   265→    const colors = {
   266→      "Công nghệ Thông tin": "from-blue-500 to-blue-600",
   267→      "Quản trị Kinh doanh": "from-green-500 to-green-600",
   268→      "Kỹ thuật Cơ khí": "from-purple-500 to-purple-600",
   269→      "Kế toán": "from-orange-500 to-orange-600"
   270→    };
   271→    return colors[major] || "from-gray-500 to-gray-600";
   272→  };
   273→
   274→  const formatDate = (dateString) => {
   275→    if (!dateString) return '';
   276→    const date = new Date(dateString);
   277→    return date.toLocaleString('vi-VN');
   278→  };
   279→
   280→  // Pagination
   281→  const totalPages = Math.ceil(filteredApplications.length / ITEMS_PER_PAGE);
   282→  const startIndex = (currentPage - 1) * ITEMS_PER_PAGE;
   283→  const paginatedApplications = filteredApplications.slice(startIndex, startIndex + ITEMS_PER_PAGE);
   284→
   285→  const bg = darkMode ? "bg-gray-900" : "bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-50 via-indigo-50 to-purple-50";
   286→  const textColor = darkMode ? "text-gray-200" : "text-gray-900";
   287→  const textMuted = darkMode ? "text-gray-400" : "text-gray-600";
   288→  const textMuted2 = darkMode ? "text-gray-500" : "text-gray-500";
   289→  const borderColor = darkMode ? "border-gray-700" : "border-gray-200";
   290→  const cardBg = darkMode ? "bg-gray-800/80" : "bg-white/80";
   291→  const cardBgSolid = darkMode ? "bg-gray-800" : "bg-white";
   292→  const filterBg = darkMode ? "bg-gray-800/50" : "bg-white/5";
   293→  const filterBorder = darkMode ? "border-gray-700" : "border-white/10";
   294→  const inputBg = darkMode ? "bg-gray-700 border-gray-600 text-gray-100" : "bg-white border-gray-300 text-gray-900";
   295→  const inputPlaceholder = darkMode ? "placeholder-gray-400" : "placeholder-gray-400";
   296→  const listItemHover = darkMode ? "hover:bg-gray-700/50" : "hover:bg-gray-50/50";
   297→  const modalBg = darkMode ? "bg-gray-800" : "bg-white";
   298→  const modalBorder = darkMode ? "border-gray-700" : "border-gray-200";
   299→  const modalText = darkMode ? "text-gray-100" : "text-gray-900";
   300→  const modalTextMuted = darkMode ? "text-gray-400" : "text-gray-600";
   301→  const sectionBg = darkMode ? "bg-gray-700/30" : "bg-gray-50";
   302→  const dividerColor = darkMode ? "divide-gray-700" : "divide-gray-200";
   303→
   304→  // Error banner
   305→  const dismissErrorBanner = () => {
   306→    setShowErrorBanner(false);
   307→    setErrorBannerMessage('');
   308→  };
   309→
   310→  return (
   311→    <div className={`min-h-screen ${bg} p-6 relative overflow-hidden`}>
   312→      {/* Modern Background Elements */}
   313→      <div className="absolute inset-0 overflow-hidden pointer-events-none">
   314→        <div className="absolute -top-40 -right-40 w-80 h-80 bg-gradient-to-br from-purple-500/20 to-cyan-500/20 rounded-full blur-3xl animate-pulse"></div>
   315→        <div className="absolute -bottom-40 -left-40 w-80 h-80 bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-500/20 to-purple-500/20 rounded-full blur-3xl animate-pulse delay-1000"></div>
   316→      </div>
   317→
   318→      {/* Error Banner */}
   319→      <AnimatePresence>
   320→        {showErrorBanner && errorBannerMessage && (
   321→          <motion.div
   322→            className="fixed top-4 left-1/2 transform -translate-x-1/2 z-50 max-w-2xl w-full mx-4"
   323→            initial={{ y: -50, opacity: 0 }}
   324→            animate={{ y: 0, opacity: 1 }}
   325→            exit={{ y: -50, opacity: 0 }}
   326→          >
   327→            <div className="bg-red-500 text-white px-6 py-3 rounded-xl shadow-2xl flex items-center justify-between gap-4">
   328→              <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
   329→                <FaTimes className="text-lg flex-shrink-0" />
   330→                <span className="font-medium">{errorBannerMessage}</span>
   331→              </div>
   332→              <button
   333→                onClick={dismissErrorBanner}
   334→                className="text-white/80 hover:text-white p-1 rounded hover:bg-white/20 transition-colors flex-shrink-0"
   335→                aria-label="Đóng thông báo lỗi"
   336→              >
   337→                <FaTimes />
   338→              </button>
   339→            </div>
   340→          </motion.div>
   341→        )}
   342→      </AnimatePresence>
   343→
   344→      <div className="relative z-10">
   345→        {/* Header */}
   346→        <motion.div
   347→          className="mb-8"
   348→          initial={{ y: -20, opacity: 0 }}
   349→          animate={{ y: 0, opacity: 1 }}
   350→          transition={{ duration: 0.6 }}
   351→        >
   352→          <div className="flex justify-between items-center">
   353→            <div>
   354→              <h1 className={`text-2xl md:text-3xl font-bold mb-2 ${darkMode ? "text-white" : "bg-gradient-to-r from-slate-900 via-purple-900 to-slate-900 bg-clip-text text-transparent"}`}>
   355→                Quản Lý Hồ Sơ
   356→              </h1>
   357→              <p className={`text-base md:text-lg ${textMuted}`}>
   358→                Quản lý hồ sơ xét tuyển của thí sinh
   359→              </p>
   360→            </div>
   361→            <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
   362→              {/* Refresh Button */}
   363→              <motion.button
   364→                onClick={fetchApplications}
   365→                className={`flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 rounded-xl shadow-lg transition-all duration-200 hover:scale-105 active:scale-95 ${darkMode ? "bg-gray-700 text-gray-200 hover:bg-gray-600" : "bg-white/80 text-gray-700 hover:bg-white"}`}
   366→                title="Làm mới dữ liệu"
   367→                whileHover={{ rotate: 180 }}
   368→                transition={{ duration: 0.4 }}
   369→              >
   370→                <FaSyncAlt className={loading ? "animate-spin" : ""} />
   371→                <span className="hidden sm:inline text-sm font-medium">Làm mới</span>
   372→              </motion.button>
   373→
   374→              <motion.div
   375→                className={`px-4 py-2 rounded-xl shadow-lg ${cardBg}`}
   376→                initial={{ scale: 0.9 }}
   377→                animate={{ scale: 1 }}
   378→              >
   379→                <span className={`text-sm ${textMuted}`}>Tổng hồ sơ: </span>
   380→                <span className={`font-bold ${darkMode ? "text-purple-400" : "text-purple-500"}`}>
   381→                  {applications.length}
   382→                </span>
   383→              </motion.div>
   384→            </div>
   385→          </div>
   386→        </motion.div>
   387→
   388→        {/* Filters */}
   389→        <motion.div
   390→          className={`${filterBg} backdrop-blur-xl rounded-2xl shadow-xl p-6 mb-8 border ${filterBorder}`}
   391→          initial={{ y: 20, opacity: 0 }}
   392→          animate={{ y: 0, opacity: 1 }}
   393→          transition={{ delay: 0.2 }}
   394→        >
   395→          <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-6">
   396→            {/* Search */}
   397→            <div className="relative">
   398→              <FaSearch className={`absolute left-4 top-1/2 transform -translate-y-1/2 ${textMuted} text-lg`} />
   399→              <input
   400→                type="text"
   401→                placeholder="Tìm kiếm theo tên, email, CCCD..."
   402→                value={searchTerm}
   403→                onChange={(e) => setSearchTerm(e.target.value)}
   404→                aria-label="Tìm kiếm hồ sơ"
   405→                className={`w-full pl-12 pr-4 py-3 border rounded-xl focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-transparent transition-all duration-200 ${inputBg} ${inputPlaceholder}`}
   406→              />
   407→            </div>
   408→
   409→            {/* Status Filter */}
   410→            <select
   411→              value={statusFilter}
   412→              onChange={(e) => setStatusFilter(e.target.value)}
   413→              aria-label="Lọc theo trạng thái"
   414→              className={`px-4 py-3 border rounded-xl focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-transparent transition-all duration-200 ${inputBg}`}
   415→            >
   416→              <option value="all">Tất cả trạng thái</option>
   417→              <option value="pending">Chờ xử lý</option>
   418→              <option value="approved">Đã duyệt</option>
   419→              <option value="rejected">Từ chối</option>
   420→            </select>
   421→
   422→            {/* Major Filter */}
   423→            <select
   424→              value={majorFilter}
   425→              onChange={(e) => setMajorFilter(e.target.value)}
   426→              aria-label="Lọc theo ngành"
   427→              className={`px-4 py-3 border rounded-xl focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-transparent transition-all duration-200 ${inputBg}`}
   428→            >
   429→              <option value="all">Tất cả ngành</option>
   430→              {majors.map(major => (
   431→                <option key={major.name} value={major.name}>{major.name}</option>
   432→              ))}
   433→            </select>
   434→
   435→            {/* Stats */}
   436→            <div className={`flex items-center text-lg ${textMuted} px-4 py-3 rounded-xl ${darkMode ? "bg-gray-700/30" : "bg-gray-50"}`}>
   437→              <FaFileAlt className={`mr-3 ${darkMode ? "text-blue-400" : "text-blue-500"}`} />
   438→              Kết quả: <span className={`font-bold ml-1 ${darkMode ? "text-gray-100" : "text-gray-900"}`}>{filteredApplications.length}</span>
   439→            </div>
   440→          </div>
   441→        </motion.div>
   442→
   443→        {/* Applications List */}
   444→        <motion.div
   445→          className={`${cardBg} backdrop-blur-sm rounded-2xl shadow-xl overflow-hidden`}
   446→          initial={{ y: 20, opacity: 0 }}
   447→          animate={{ y: 0, opacity: 1 }}
   448→          transition={{ delay: 0.3 }}
   449→        >
   450→          {/* Compact Inline Loading Indicator */}
   451→          {loading && (
   452→            <div className={`flex items-center justify-center gap-3 py-4 ${borderColor} border-b`}>
   453→              <div className={`animate-spin rounded-full h-5 w-5 border-b-2 ${darkMode ? "border-blue-400" : "border-blue-600"}`}></div>
   454→              <span className={`text-sm ${textMuted}`}>
   455→                {isDemoMode ? 'Đang tải dữ liệu demo...' : 'Đang tải dữ liệu...'}
   456→              </span>
   457→            </div>
   458→          )}
   459→
   460→          <div className={`divide-y ${dividerColor}`}>
   461→            {!loading && filteredApplications.length === 0 ? (
   462→              <div className={`p-8 text-center ${textMuted}`}>
   463→                <FaFileAlt className={`mx-auto text-4xl mb-4 ${darkMode ? "text-gray-600" : "text-gray-300"}`} />
   464→                <h3 className={`text-lg font-semibold mb-2 ${textColor}`}>Không có hồ sơ nào</h3>
   465→                <p>Không tìm thấy hồ sơ phù hợp với bộ lọc hiện tại.</p>
   466→              </div>
   467→            ) : (
   468→              paginatedApplications.map((app, index) => (
   469→              <motion.div
   470→                key={app.id}
   471→                initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}
   472→                animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
   473→                transition={{ delay: index * 0.05 }}
   474→                className={`p-6 ${listItemHover} transition-all duration-300 ${borderColor} border-b last:border-b-0`}
   475→              >
   476→                <div className="flex justify-between items-start">
   477→                  <div className="flex-1">
   478→                    <div className="flex items-center mb-3">
   479→                      <div className={`w-12 h-12 bg-gradient-to-r ${getMajorColor(app.major_name || app.major)} rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center mr-4`}>
   480→                        {app.avatar || (app.user && app.user.avatar) ? (
   481→                          <img
   482→                            src={app.avatar || (app.user && app.user.avatar)}
   483→                            alt={app.ho_ten || app.studentName}
   484→                            className="w-12 h-12 rounded-xl object-cover border-2 border-white shadow"
   485→                          />
   486→                        ) : (
   487→                          <FaGraduationCap className="text-white text-lg" />
   488→                        )}
   489→                      </div>
   490→                      <div className="flex-1">
   491→                        <h3 className={`text-xl font-bold mb-1 ${textColor}`}>
   492→                          {app.ho_ten || app.studentName}
   493→                        </h3>
   494→                        <p className={textMuted}>{app.major_name || app.major}</p>
   495→                      </div>
   496→                      {getStatusBadge(app.status)}
   497→                    </div>
   498→
   499→                    <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-4 mb-4">
   500→                      <div className={`flex items-center gap-2 text-sm ${textMuted}`}>
   501→                        <FaEnvelope className={darkMode ? "text-blue-400" : "text-blue-500"} />
   502→                        {app.email}
   503→                      </div>
   504→                      <div className={`flex items-center gap-2 text-sm ${textMuted}`}>
   505→                        <FaPhone className={darkMode ? "text-green-400" : "text-green-500"} />
   506→                        {app.sdt || app.phone || 'Chưa có'}
   507→                      </div>
   508→                      <div className={`flex items-center gap-2 text-sm ${textMuted}`}>
   509→                        <FaIdCard className={darkMode ? "text-purple-400" : "text-purple-500"} />
   510→                        {app.cccd || 'Chưa có'}
   511→                      </div>
   512→                    </div>
   513→
   514→                    <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
   515→                      <div className={`flex items-center gap-4 text-sm ${textMuted2}`}>
   516→                        <span className="flex items-center gap-1">
   517→                          <FaCalendar className={darkMode ? "text-orange-400" : "text-orange-500"} />
   518→                          {formatDate(app.created_at || app.submittedAt)}
   519→                        </span>
   520→                        <span className="flex items-center gap-1">
   521→                          GPA: {app.gpa || 'N/A'}
   522→                        </span>
   523→                        <span className="flex items-center gap-1">
   524→                          {app.phuong_thuc_xet_tuyen || 'Chưa rõ'}
   525→                        </span>
   526→                      </div>
   527→
   528→                      <div className="flex space-x-2">
   529→                        <button
   530→                          onClick={() => handleViewDetails(app)}
   531→                          className={`p-3 ${darkMode ? "text-blue-400 hover:bg-blue-900/30" : "text-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-100"} rounded-xl transition-all duration-200 hover:scale-110 active:scale-90`}
   532→                          title="Xem chi tiết"
   533→                          aria-label="Xem chi tiết hồ sơ"
   534→                        >
   535→                          <FaEye />
   536→                        </button>
   537→                        <button
   538→                          onClick={() => handleStatusChange(app.id, "approved")}
   539→                          className={`p-3 ${darkMode ? "text-green-400 hover:bg-green-900/30" : "text-green-600 hover:bg-green-100"} rounded-xl transition-all duration-200 hover:scale-110 active:scale-90`}
   540→                          title="Duyệt hồ sơ"
   541→                          aria-label="Duyệt hồ sơ"
   542→                        >
   543→                          <FaCheck />
   544→                        </button>
   545→                        <button
   546→                          onClick={() => handleStatusChange(app.id, "rejected")}
   547→                          className={`p-3 ${darkMode ? "text-red-400 hover:bg-red-900/30" : "text-red-600 hover:bg-red-100"} rounded-xl transition-all duration-200 hover:scale-110 active:scale-90`}
   548→                          title="Từ chối"
   549→                          aria-label="Từ chối hồ sơ"
   550→                        >
   551→                          <FaTimes />
   552→                        </button>
   553→                        <button
   554→                          className={`p-3 ${darkMode ? "text-purple-400 hover:bg-purple-900/30" : "text-purple-600 hover:bg-purple-100"} rounded-xl transition-all duration-200 hover:scale-110 active:scale-90`}

     1→import React, { createContext, useContext, useState, useEffect, useCallback, useRef } from 'react';
     2→import { useUser } from '../accounts/UserContext';
     3→import { toast } from 'sonner';
     4→
     5→const NotificationContext = createContext(null);
     6→
     7→export const useNotifications = () => {
     8→    const context = useContext(NotificationContext);
     9→    if (!context) throw new Error('useNotifications must be used within NotificationProvider');
    10→    return context;
    11→};
    12→
    13→export function NotificationProvider({ children }) {
    14→    const { role, token, isDemoMode } = useUser();
    15→    const [notifications, setNotifications] = useState([]);
    16→    const [unreadCount, setUnreadCount] = useState(0);
    17→    const [isConnected, setIsConnected] = useState(false);
    18→    const [isReconnecting, setIsReconnecting] = useState(false);
    19→
    20→    const eventSourceRef = useRef(null);
    21→    const retryCountRef = useRef(0);
    22→    const retryTimeoutRef = useRef(null);
    23→    const isMountedRef = useRef(true);
    24→
    25→    const isAdminOrStaff = role === 'admin' || role === 'staff';
    26→
    27→    const getRetryDelay = useCallback((count) => {
    28→        return Math.min(1000 * Math.pow(2, count), 30000);
    29→    }, []);
    30→
    31→    const connectSSE = useCallback(() => {
    32→        if (isDemoMode || !token || !isAdminOrStaff) return;
    33→        if (eventSourceRef.current) {
    34→            eventSourceRef.current.close();
    35→            eventSourceRef.current = null;
    36→        }
    37→
    38→        const API_BASE = import.meta.env.VITE_API_URL || 'http://localhost:3001';
    39→        const sseUrl = `${API_BASE}/api/sse/events`;
    40→
    41→        try {
    42→            const es = new EventSource(sseUrl, { withCredentials: true });
    43→            eventSourceRef.current = es;
    44→
    45→            es.onopen = () => {
    46→                if (!isMountedRef.current) return;
    47→                setIsConnected(true);
    48→                setIsReconnecting(false);
    49→                retryCountRef.current = 0;
    50→            };
    51→
    52→            es.addEventListener('connected', () => {
    53→                console.log('[SSE] Connected');
    54→            });
    55→
    56→            es.addEventListener('new_application', (event) => {
    57→                if (!isMountedRef.current) return;
    58→                try {
    59→                    const data = JSON.parse(event.data);
    60→                    const notification = {
    61→                        id: data.id || Date.now(),
    62→                        title: 'Hồ sơ mới',
    63→                        message: `Thí sinh ${data.candidateName || 'mới'} vừa nộp hồ sơ`,
    64→                        type: 'new_application',
    65→                        time: 'Vừa xong',
    66→                        unread: true,
    67→                        applicationId: data.id,
    68→                        timestamp: data.timestamp || new Date().toISOString(),
    69→                    };
    70→                    setNotifications(prev => [notification, ...prev].slice(0, 50));
    71→                    setUnreadCount(prev => prev + 1);
    72→                    toast.success(notification.title, { description: notification.message, duration: 5000 });
    73→                } catch (err) {
    74→                    console.error('[SSE] Parse error:', err);
    75→                }
    76→            });
    77→
    78→            es.onerror = () => {
    79→                if (!isMountedRef.current) return;
    80→                setIsConnected(false);
    81→                es.close();
    82→                eventSourceRef.current = null;
    83→
    84→                if (retryCountRef.current < 10) {
    85→                    const delay = getRetryDelay(retryCountRef.current);
    86→                    setIsReconnecting(true);
    87→                    retryCountRef.current += 1;
    88→                    retryTimeoutRef.current = setTimeout(connectSSE, delay);
    89→                } else {
    90→                    setIsReconnecting(false);
    91→                }
    92→            };
    93→        } catch (err) {
    94→            console.error('[SSE] Failed to create EventSource:', err);
    95→        }
    96→    }, [token, isAdminOrStaff, isDemoMode, getRetryDelay]);
    97→
    98→    useEffect(() => {
    99→        isMountedRef.current = true;
   100→        if (isAdminOrStaff && !isDemoMode && token) {
   101→            const timer = setTimeout(connectSSE, 500);
   102→            return () => {
   103→                isMountedRef.current = false;
   104→                clearTimeout(timer);
   105→                clearTimeout(retryTimeoutRef.current);
   106→                if (eventSourceRef.current) {
   107→                    eventSourceRef.current.close();
   108→                    eventSourceRef.current = null;
   109→                }
   110→                setIsConnected(false);
   111→                setIsReconnecting(false);
   112→            };
   113→        } else {
   114→            if (eventSourceRef.current) eventSourceRef.current.close();
   115→            eventSourceRef.current = null;
   116→            setIsConnected(false);
   117→            setIsReconnecting(false);
   118→            setNotifications([]);
   119→            setUnreadCount(0);
   120→        }
   121→    }, [isAdminOrStaff, token, isDemoMode, connectSSE]);
   122→
   123→    const markAsRead = useCallback((id) => {
   124→        setNotifications(prev => prev.map(n => n.id === id ? { ...n, unread: false } : n));
   125→        setUnreadCount(prev => Math.max(0, prev - 1));
   126→    }, []);
   127→
   128→    const markAllAsRead = useCallback(() => {
   129→        setNotifications(prev => prev.map(n => ({ ...n, unread: false })));
   130→        setUnreadCount(0);
   131→    }, []);
   132→
   133→    const clearNotifications = useCallback(() => {
   134→        setNotifications([]);
   135→        setUnreadCount(0);
   136→    }, []);
   137→
   138→    return (
   139→        <NotificationContext.Provider value={{ notifications, unreadCount, isConnected, isReconnecting, markAsRead, markAllAsRead, clearNotifications }}>
   140→            {children}
   141→        </NotificationContext.Provider>
   142→    );
   143→}
   144→
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./\DoAnTuyenSinh\backend\services\sseService.js`

```text
     1→// backend/services/sseService.js
     2→class SSEService {
     3→    constructor() {
     4→        this.clients = new Map();
     5→    }
     6→
     7→    addClient(channelKey, res) {
     8→        if (!this.clients.has(channelKey)) {
     9→            this.clients.set(channelKey, new Set());
    10→        }
    11→        this.clients.get(channelKey).add(res);
    12→        console.log(`[SSE] Client connected: ${channelKey} (total: ${this.clients.get(channelKey).size})`);
    13→    }
    14→
    15→    removeClient(channelKey, res) {
    16→        if (this.clients.has(channelKey)) {
    17→            this.clients.get(channelKey).delete(res);
    18→            if (this.clients.get(channelKey).size === 0) {
    19→                this.clients.delete(channelKey);
    20→            }
    21→        }
    22→        console.log(`[SSE] Client disconnected: ${channelKey}`);
    23→    }
    24→
    25→    broadcast(channelKey, eventName, data) {
    26→        const clientSet = this.clients.get(channelKey);
    27→        if (!clientSet || clientSet.size === 0) return;
    28→        const message = `event: ${eventName}\ndata: ${JSON.stringify(data)}\n\n`;
    29→        for (const res of clientSet) {
    30→            if (!res.writableEnded) res.write(message);
    31→        }
    32→    }
    33→
    34→    broadcastAll(eventName, data) {
    35→        const message = `event: ${eventName}\ndata: ${JSON.stringify(data)}\n\n`;
    36→        for (const [, clientSet] of this.clients) {
    37→            for (const res of clientSet) {
    38→                if (!res.writableEnded) res.write(message);
    39→            }
    40→        }
    41→    }
    42→
    43→    getConnectionCount(channelKey) {
    44→        return this.clients.has(channelKey) ? this.clients.get(channelKey).size : 0;
    45→    }
    46→
    47→    getTotalConnections() {
    48→        let total = 0;
    49→        for (const [, clientSet] of this.clients) total += clientSet.size;
    50→        return total;
    51→    }
    52→}
    53→
    54→export default new SSEService();
    55→
```

     1→ // Avatar utility functions
     2→ export const getAvatarUrl = (user) => {
     3→     if (!user || !user.avatar) {
     4→         console.log("No avatar found for user:", user);
     5→         return null;
     6→     }
     7→
     8→     let avatarUrl = user.avatar;
     9→
    10→     // Handle different avatar URL formats
    11→     if (avatarUrl.startsWith('http')) {
    12→         console.log("Avatar is already full URL:", avatarUrl);
    13→         return avatarUrl;
    14→     } else if (avatarUrl.startsWith('/uploads/')) {
    15→         const fullUrl = `http://localhost:3001${avatarUrl}`;
    16→         console.log("Avatar converted from relative to full URL:", { original: avatarUrl, full: fullUrl });
    17→         return fullUrl;
    18→     } else {
    19→         const fullUrl = `http://localhost:3001/uploads/${avatarUrl}`;
    20→         console.log("Avatar converted from filename to full URL:", { original: avatarUrl, full: fullUrl });
    21→         return fullUrl;
    22→     }
    23→ };
    24→
    25→ export const debugUserAvatar = (user, context = "unknown") => {
    26→     console.log(`[Avatar Debug - ${context}]`, {
    27→         user: user,
    28→         hasAvatar: !!(user && user.avatar),
    29→         avatarValue: user ? user.avatar : null,
    30→         avatarUrl: getAvatarUrl(user),
    31→         userKeys: user ? Object.keys(user) : []
    32→     });
    33→ };
    34→
    35→ export const testAvatarLoad = async(avatarUrl) => {
    36→     if (!avatarUrl) {
    37→         console.log("No avatar URL to test");
    38→         return false;
    39→     }
    40→
    41→     try {
    42→         const response = await fetch(avatarUrl, { method: 'HEAD' });
    43→         const success = response.ok;
    44→         console.log(`Avatar load test for ${avatarUrl}:`, success ? "SUCCESS" : "FAILED", response.status);
    45→         return success;
    46→     } catch (error) {
    47→         console.log(`Avatar load test for ${avatarUrl}: ERROR`, error.message);
    48→         return false;
    49→     }
    50→ };

#### NotificationContext (SSE Client)

**File**: `C:/Users/Admin/source/repos/DoAnTuyenSinh/DoAnTuyenSinh/src/contexts/NotificationContext.jsx`

- Connects to `EventSource` at `/api/sse/events` (line 39) for admin/staff roles only
- Listens for `new_application` event (line 56), parses it, prepends to notifications list, increments `unreadCount`, and fires a toast
- Auto-reconnects with exponential backoff up to 10 retries (lines 84-91)
- Cleanup on unmount or when role changes (lines 98-121)

```js

es.addEventListener('new_application', (event) => {
    const data = JSON.parse(event.data);
    const notification = {
        id: data.id || Date.now(),
        title: 'Ho so moi',
        message: `Thi sinh ${data.candidateName || 'moi'} vua nop ho so`,
        type: 'new_application',
        ...
    };
    setNotifications(prev => [notification, ...prev].slice(0, 50));

#### SSE Service (Backend Broadcast)

```js
broadcast(channelKey, eventName, data) {
    const clientSet = this.clients.get(channelKey);
    const message = `event: ${eventName}\ndata: ${JSON.stringify(data)}\n\n`;
    for (const res of clientSet) {
        if (!res.writableEnded) res.write(message);
    }
}
```

Broadcasts to the `'admin'` channel when a new application is submitted:

});

The SSE endpoint at `GET /api/sse/events` (backend/index.js lines 68-94) routes clients to either `'admin'` channel or their `userId` channel based on role.

### Critical Inconsistencies Found

**Issue 1: Avatar never stored with application, so detail page never shows it.**

The `applications` table INSERT (backend/index.js lines 708-729) does NOT include any avatar column. The table schema (found via ALTER statements at lines 2323-2339) only has columns for: `application_code, ho_ten, ngay_sinh, cccd, sdt, email, noi_hoc_12, truong_thpt, ten_lop_12, dia_chi, nganh_id, nganh_ids, phuong_thuc_xet_tuyen, khoi_thi, diem_thi_thpt, diem_danh_gia_nang_luc, diem_hk1, diem_ca_nam, user_id, status, created_at, updated_at`. No avatar field exists.

Meanwhile, `QuanLyHoSo.jsx` line 480-485 tries to display an avatar:
```jsx
{app.avatar || (app.user && app.user.avatar) ? (
  <img src={app.avatar || (app.user && app.user.avatar)} ... />
) : (
  <FaGraduationCap className="text-white text-lg" />
)}
```

And the backend `GET /api/admin/applications` query (lines 936-948) does a `LEFT JOIN nganh` only -- it does NOT join the `users` table and does NOT select any avatar. So `app.avatar` and `app.user` are always `undefined` in real mode.

The only place an avatar URL appears in any API response is:
- `GET /api/admin/recent-applications` (line 832) -- generates a `ui-avatars.com` placeholder: `avatar: \`https://ui-avatars.com/api/?name=${encodeURIComponent(app.ho_ten)}&background=3b82f6&color=fff\``
- `POST /api/auth/login` (line 187) -- returns `user.avatar` from the `users` table

**Issue 2: DangKyXetTuyen has no avatar upload, so even if you fix the detail page, there is nothing to show.**

The registration form does not collect or submit any avatar. If the intent is to show the candidate's photo in the admin detail view, the registration form first needs a photo upload field, and that URL needs to be stored either in the `applications` table or via a `JOIN` to the `users` table.

**Issue 3: fileHoSo is submitted as a single file, but displayed as multiple attachment thumbnails.**

The form has one `fileHoSo` state (single file), but the detail modal's attachment renderer (lines 699-714) expects `selectedApplication.attachments` as an array. The backend API (`POST /api/auth/apply`) does NOT handle file uploads at all -- it sends `applicationData` as JSON only. So `attachments` in the detail modal would only work in demo mode (where `DEMO_APPLICATIONS` provides the data).

```text
     1→import React, { createContext, useContext, useState, useEffect, useCallback, useRef } from 'react';
     2→import { useUser } from '../accounts/UserContext';
     3→import { toast } from 'sonner';
     4→
     5→const NotificationContext = createContext(null);
     6→
     7→export const useNotifications = () => {
     8→    const context = useContext(NotificationContext);
     9→    if (!context) throw new Error('useNotifications must be used within NotificationProvider');
    10→    return context;
    11→};
    12→
    13→export function NotificationProvider({ children }) {
    14→    const { role, token, isDemoMode } = useUser();
    15→    const [notifications, setNotifications] = useState([]);
    16→    const [unreadCount, setUnreadCount] = useState(0);
    17→    const [isConnected, setIsConnected] = useState(false);
    18→    const [isReconnecting, setIsReconnecting] = useState(false);
    19→
    20→    const eventSourceRef = useRef(null);
    21→    const retryCountRef = useRef(0);
    22→    const retryTimeoutRef = useRef(null);
    23→    const isMountedRef = useRef(true);
    24→
    25→    const isAdminOrStaff = role === 'admin' || role === 'staff';
    26→
    27→    const getRetryDelay = useCallback((count) => {
    28→        return Math.min(1000 * Math.pow(2, count), 30000);
    29→    }, []);
    30→
    31→    const connectSSE = useCallback(() => {
    32→        if (isDemoMode || !token || !isAdminOrStaff) return;
    33→        if (eventSourceRef.current) {
    34→            eventSourceRef.current.close();
    35→            eventSourceRef.current = null;
    36→        }
    37→
    38→        const API_BASE = import.meta.env.VITE_API_URL || 'http://localhost:3001';
    39→        const sseUrl = `${API_BASE}/api/sse/events`;
    40→
    41→        try {
    42→            const es = new EventSource(sseUrl, { withCredentials: true });
    43→            eventSourceRef.current = es;
    44→
    45→            es.onopen = () => {
    46→                if (!isMountedRef.current) return;
    47→                setIsConnected(true);
    48→                setIsReconnecting(false);
    49→                retryCountRef.current = 0;
    50→            };
    51→
    52→            es.addEventListener('connected', () => {
    53→                console.log('[SSE] Connected');
    54→            });
    55→
    56→            es.addEventListener('new_application', (event) => {
    57→                if (!isMountedRef.current) return;
    58→                try {
    59→                    const data = JSON.parse(event.data);
    60→                    const notification = {
    61→                        id: data.id || Date.now(),
    62→                        title: 'Hồ sơ mới',
    63→                        message: `Thí sinh ${data.candidateName || 'mới'} vừa nộp hồ sơ`,
    64→                        type: 'new_application',
    65→                        time: 'Vừa xong',
    66→                        unread: true,
    67→                        applicationId: data.id,
    68→                        timestamp: data.timestamp || new Date().toISOString(),
    69→                    };
    70→                    setNotifications(prev => [notification, ...prev].slice(0, 50));
    71→                    setUnreadCount(prev => prev + 1);
    72→                    toast.success(notification.title, { description: notification.message, duration: 5000 });
    73→                } catch (err) {
    74→                    console.error('[SSE] Parse error:', err);
    75→                }
    76→            });
    77→
    78→            es.onerror = () => {
    79→                if (!isMountedRef.current) return;
    80→                setIsConnected(false);
    81→                es.close();
    82→                eventSourceRef.current = null;
    83→
    84→                if (retryCountRef.current < 10) {
    85→                    const delay = getRetryDelay(retryCountRef.current);
    86→                    setIsReconnecting(true);
    87→                    retryCountRef.current += 1;
    88→                    retryTimeoutRef.current = setTimeout(connectSSE, delay);
    89→                } else {
    90→                    setIsReconnecting(false);
    91→                }
    92→            };
    93→        } catch (err) {
    94→            console.error('[SSE] Failed to create EventSource:', err);
    95→        }
    96→    }, [token, isAdminOrStaff, isDemoMode, getRetryDelay]);
    97→
    98→    useEffect(() => {
    99→        isMountedRef.current = true;
   100→        if (isAdminOrStaff && !isDemoMode && token) {
   101→            const timer = setTimeout(connectSSE, 500);
   102→            return () => {
   103→                isMountedRef.current = false;
   104→                clearTimeout(timer);
   105→                clearTimeout(retryTimeoutRef.current);
   106→                if (eventSourceRef.current) {
   107→                    eventSourceRef.current.close();
   108→                    eventSourceRef.current = null;
   109→                }
   110→                setIsConnected(false);
   111→                setIsReconnecting(false);
   112→            };
   113→        } else {
   114→            if (eventSourceRef.current) eventSourceRef.current.close();
   115→            eventSourceRef.current = null;
   116→            setIsConnected(false);
   117→            setIsReconnecting(false);
   118→            setNotifications([]);
   119→            setUnreadCount(0);
   120→        }
   121→    }, [isAdminOrStaff, token, isDemoMode, connectSSE]);
   122→
   123→    const markAsRead = useCallback((id) => {
   124→        setNotifications(prev => prev.map(n => n.id === id ? { ...n, unread: false } : n));
   125→        setUnreadCount(prev => Math.max(0, prev - 1));
   126→    }, []);
   127→
   128→    const markAllAsRead = useCallback(() => {
   129→        setNotifications(prev => prev.map(n => ({ ...n, unread: false })));
   130→        setUnreadCount(0);
   131→    }, []);
   132→
   133→    const clearNotifications = useCallback(() => {
   134→        setNotifications([]);
   135→        setUnreadCount(0);
   136→    }, []);
   137→
   138→    return (
   139→        <NotificationContext.Provider value={{ notifications, unreadCount, isConnected, isReconnecting, markAsRead, markAllAsRead, clearNotifications }}>
   140→            {children}
   141→        </NotificationContext.Provider>
   142→    );
   143→}
   144→
```

     1→import jwt from 'jsonwebtoken';
     2→import pool from '../config/database.js';
     3→
     4→export const authenticateToken = (req, res, next) => {
     5→    const authHeader = req.headers['authorization'];
     6→    const token = authHeader && authHeader.split(' ')[1]; // Bearer TOKEN
     7→
     8→    if (!token) {
     9→        return res.status(401).json({
    10→            success: false,
    11→            message: 'Access token required'
    12→        });
    13→    }
    14→
    15→    try {
    16→        const decoded = jwt.verify(token, process.env.JWT_SECRET || 'your-secret-key');
    17→        req.user = decoded;
    18→        next();
    19→    } catch (error) {
    20→        console.error('Token verification error:', error);
    21→        return res.status(403).json({
    22→            success: false,
    23→            message: 'Invalid or expired token'
    24→        });
    25→    }
    26→};
    27→
    28→export const requireRole = (roles) => {
    29→    return (req, res, next) => {
    30→        if (!req.user) {
    31→            return res.status(401).json({
    32→                success: false,
    33→                message: 'Authentication required'
    34→            });
    35→        }
    36→
    37→        if (!roles.includes(req.user.role)) {
    38→            return res.status(403).json({
    39→                success: false,
    40→                message: 'Insufficient permissions'
    41→            });
    42→        }
    43→
    44→        next();
    45→    };
    46→};
    47→
    48→export const authenticateAdminFAQ = async(req, res, next) => {
    49→    try {
    50→        const authHeader = req.headers.authorization;
    51→        if (!authHeader || !authHeader.startsWith('Bearer ')) {
    52→            return res.status(401).json({ success: false, message: 'Không có quyền truy cập' });
    53→        }
    54→        const token = authHeader.split(' ')[1];
    55→        const [rows] = await pool.execute(
    56→            'SELECT id, username, role FROM users WHERE token = ? AND role IN ("admin", "staff")',
    57→            [token]
    58→        );
    59→        if (rows.length === 0) {
    60→            return res.status(401).json({ success: false, message: 'Token không hợp lệ hoặc không có quyền' });
    61→        }
    62→        req.user = rows[0];
    63→        next();
    64→    } catch (error) {
    65→        res.status(500).json({ success: false, message: 'Lỗi xác thực', error: error.message });
    66→    }
    67→};
```

     4→        this.clients = new Map();
     5→    }
     6→
     7→    addClient(channelKey, res) {
     8→        if (!this.clients.has(channelKey)) {
     9→            this.clients.set(channelKey, new Set());
    10→        }
    11→        this.clients.get(channelKey).add(res);

    15→    removeClient(channelKey, res) {

    17→            this.clients.get(channelKey).delete(res);
    18→            if (this.clients.get(channelKey).size === 0) {
    19→                this.clients.delete(channelKey);
    20→            }
    21→        }
    22→        console.log(`[SSE] Client disconnected: ${channelKey}`);
    23→    }
    24→
    25→    broadcast(channelKey, eventName, data) {
    26→        const clientSet = this.clients.get(channelKey);
    27→        if (!clientSet || clientSet.size === 0) return;
    28→        const message = `event: ${eventName}\ndata: ${JSON.stringify(data)}\n\n`;
    29→        for (const res of clientSet) {
    30→            if (!res.writableEnded) res.write(message);
    31→        }
    32→    }
    33→
    34→    broadcastAll(eventName, data) {
    35→        const message = `event: ${eventName}\ndata: ${JSON.stringify(data)}\n\n`;
    36→        for (const [, clientSet] of this.clients) {
    37→            for (const res of clientSet) {
    38→                if (!res.writableEnded) res.write(message);
    39→            }
    40→        }
    41→    }
    42→
    43→    getConnectionCount(channelKey) {
    44→        return this.clients.has(channelKey) ? this.clients.get(channelKey).size : 0;
    45→    }
    46→
    47→    getTotalConnections() {
    48→        let total = 0;
    49→        for (const [, clientSet] of this.clients) total += clientSet.size;
    50→        return total;
    51→    }
    52→}

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-30 20:05:31Z)**_

**Tất cả 3 vấn đề đã được fix. Tóm tắt:**

---

### Fix 1: SSE Notification không nhận được
**Root cause:** `EventSource` không gửi được `Authorization` header nên luôn bị 401. Cộng thêm SSE endpoint vẫn tiếp tục xử lý dù auth fail → không nhận event nào.

**Fix:**
- `middleware/auth.js` — thêm hỗ trợ token qua query param (`?token=xxx`)
- `NotificationContext.jsx` — truyền token qua query URL
- `index.js` (SSE endpoint) — check `req.user` trước khi set up SSE, reject ngay nếu 401

---

### Fix 2: Notification label không hiện số
**Root cause:** Cùng root cause trên — SSE không kết nối được nên `new_application` event không bao giờ được fire, `unreadCount` luôn = 0.

**Fix:** Đã được giải quyết bởi Fix 1.

---

### Fix 3: Avatar thiếu trong popup Chi tiết hồ sơ
**Root cause:**
- Backend API không select `avatar` từ users table
- Modal Chi tiết không hiển thị avatar

**Fix:**
- `index.js` — thêm `LEFT JOIN users` và select `candidate_avatar` trong cả main query, count query và fallback query
- Thêm `candidateAvatar` và `phuong_thuc_xet_tuyen` vào formatted response
- `QuanLyHoSo.jsx` — thêm avatar + icon vào header modal Chi tiết (hiển thị avatar từ user nếu có, không thì icon mặc định)
- Backend broadcast gửi kèm `candidateAvatar` khi có hồ sơ mới
- `NotificationBell.jsx` — hiển thị avatar candidate trong notification

---

**Lưu ý:** Avatar chỉ hiển thị khi thí sinh đã upload avatar trong hồ sơ cá nhân trước khi đăng ký xét tuyển (avatar lấy từ bảng `users`, gắn qua `user_id` của đơn đăng ký).

---

Bạn là senior Frontend Engineer. Hãy sửa giao diện cho dự án tuyển sinh HUTECH React + Vite + Tailwind theo yêu cầu bên dưới.

## Mục tiêu cần fix

### 1) Fix lỗi sidebar khi mở modal xem hồ sơ
Hiện tại khi admin mở modal "xem chi tiết hồ sơ", thanh sidebar bên trái vẫn nổi lên / đè layout / tạo cảm giác modal không thật sự nằm trên cùng.
Yêu cầu:
- Modal phải nổi trên toàn bộ nội dung trang
- Sidebar, topbar, bảng danh sách phía dưới phải nằm dưới lớp overlay của modal
- Không để sidebar che modal hoặc chen vào vùng modal
- Khi mở modal phải khóa scroll nền (`document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden'`), khi đóng modal phải trả lại bình thường
- Modal phải căn giữa màn hình, overlay phủ toàn bộ viewport
- Z-index phải được tổ chức rõ ràng, tránh fix chắp vá

### 2) Bổ sung hiển thị hình ảnh học bạ và CCCD trong modal xem hồ sơ
Ở modal chi tiết hồ sơ hiện đang hiện "Không có file đính kèm" hoặc chưa render phần ảnh rõ ràng.
Tôi muốn:
- Hiển thị danh sách ảnh/file đã upload của hồ sơ, đặc biệt:
  - Học bạ
  - CCCD mặt trước
  - CCCD mặt sau
  - Các ảnh/file liên quan khác nếu có
- Nếu file là ảnh: render thumbnail trong modal
- Nếu file là PDF hoặc file không phải ảnh: render item file + nút mở file tab mới
- Khi click vào thumbnail ảnh:
  - Mở image preview dạng lightbox/fullscreen modal riêng
  - Có thể zoom in / zoom out
  - Có thể pan / kéo ảnh khi đã zoom
  - Có nút đóng preview
  - Có thể click nền tối để đóng
  - Có ESC để đóng
- Preview ảnh phải ưu tiên UX tốt cho admin duyệt hồ sơ
- Ảnh cần giữ đúng tỉ lệ, không méo
- Thumbnail đẹp, đồng bộ style với UI hiện tại

- Tạo overlay fixed full screen:

- Wrapper modal:

- Box modal:

- Nội dung cuộn bên trong modal, không để toàn trang cuộn

### B. Chuẩn hóa z-index
Hãy kiểm tra toàn bộ `z-index` của:
- sidebar

- dropdown

- Sidebar/Header bình thường: z-20 / z-30
- Dropdown/popover: z-40 / z-50
- Modal overlay hồ sơ: z-[1000]
- Modal content hồ sơ: z-[1001]

import React, { useState, useEffect, useRef } from 'react';
import { createPortal } from 'react-dom';
import { motion, AnimatePresence } from 'framer-motion';
import { FaTimes, FaSearchPlus, FaSearchMinus, FaArrowsAlt, FaDownload, FaFilePdf } from 'react-icons/fa';

export default function ImagePreview({ src, alt, onClose }) {
  const [scale, setScale] = useState(1);
  const [position, setPosition] = useState({ x: 0, y: 0 });
  const [isDragging, setIsDragging] = useState(false);
  const [dragStart, setDragStart] = useState({ x: 0, y: 0 });
  const imgRef = useRef(null);
  const containerRef = useRef(null);

  // ESC to close
  useEffect(() => {
    const handleKeyDown = (e) => {
      if (e.key === 'Escape') onClose();
      if (e.key === '+' || e.key === '=') setScale(s => Math.min(s + 0.25, 5));
      if (e.key === '-') setScale(s => Math.max(s - 0.25, 0.5));
    };
    window.addEventListener('keydown', handleKeyDown);
    return () => window.removeEventListener('keydown', handleKeyDown);
  }, [onClose]);

  // Reset position when src changes
  useEffect(() => {
    setScale(1);
    setPosition({ x: 0, y: 0 });
  }, [src]);

  const handleWheel = (e) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    const delta = e.deltaY > 0 ? -0.1 : 0.1;
    setScale(s => Math.max(0.5, Math.min(s + delta, 5)));
  };

  const handleMouseDown = (e) => {
    if (scale > 1) {
      setIsDragging(true);
      setDragStart({ x: e.clientX - position.x, y: e.clientY - position.y });
    }
  };

  const handleMouseMove = (e) => {
    if (isDragging) {
      setPosition({
        x: e.clientX - dragStart.x,
        y: e.clientY - dragStart.y
      });
    }
  };

  const handleMouseUp = () => {
    setIsDragging(false);
  };

  const handleReset = () => {
    setScale(1);
    setPosition({ x: 0, y: 0 });
  };

  const handleDownload = () => {
    const link = document.createElement('a');
    link.href = src;
    link.download = alt || 'image';
    link.target = '_blank';
    document.body.appendChild(link);
    link.click();
    document.body.removeChild(link);
  };

  const content = (
    <AnimatePresence>
      <motion.div
        ref={containerRef}
        className="fixed inset-0 z-[1100] flex items-center justify-center"
        initial={{ opacity: 0 }}
        animate={{ opacity: 1 }}
        exit={{ opacity: 0 }}
        onClick={onClose}
      >
        {/* Backdrop */}
        <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-black/90 backdrop-blur-sm" />

        {/* Controls bar */}
        <div className="absolute top-0 left-0 right-0 z-[1101] flex items-center justify-between px-6 py-4 bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-md">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
            <span className="text-white/80 text-sm font-medium">{alt || 'Xem ảnh'}</span>
            <span className="text-white/40 text-xs">{Math.round(scale * 100)}%</span>
          </div>
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
            <button
              onClick={(e) => { e.stopPropagation(); setScale(s => Math.min(s + 0.5, 5)); }}
              className="p-2 rounded-lg bg-white/10 hover:bg-white/20 text-white transition-colors"
              title="Phóng to (+)"
            >
              <FaSearchPlus />
            </button>
            <button
              onClick={(e) => { e.stopPropagation(); setScale(s => Math.max(s - 0.5, 0.5)); }}
              className="p-2 rounded-lg bg-white/10 hover:bg-white/20 text-white transition-colors"
              title="Thu nhỏ (-)"
            >
              <FaSearchMinus />
            </button>
            <button
              onClick={(e) => { e.stopPropagation(); handleReset(); }}
              className="p-2 rounded-lg bg-white/10 hover:bg-white/20 text-white transition-colors"
              title="Đặt lại"
            >
              <FaArrowsAlt />
            </button>
            <button
              onClick={(e) => { e.stopPropagation(); handleDownload(); }}
              className="p-2 rounded-lg bg-white/10 hover:bg-white/20 text-white transition-colors"
              title="Tải về"
            >
              <FaDownload />
            </button>
            <button
              onClick={(e) => { e.stopPropagation(); onClose(); }}
              className="p-2 rounded-lg bg-white/10 hover:bg-red-500/80 text-white transition-colors"
              title="Đóng (ESC)"
            >
              <FaTimes />
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Image */}
        <motion.img
          ref={imgRef}
          src={src}
          alt={alt}
          className="max-w-full max-h-full object-contain select-none"
          style={{
            transform: `translate(${position.x}px, ${position.y}px) scale(${scale})`,
            cursor: scale > 1 ? (isDragging ? 'grabbing' : 'grab') : 'zoom-in',
            transition: isDragging ? 'none' : 'transform 0.2s ease'
          }}
          draggable={false}
          onClick={(e) => { e.stopPropagation(); if (scale < 1) setScale(s => Math.min(s + 0.5, 3)); }}
          onWheel={handleWheel}
          onMouseDown={handleMouseDown}
          onMouseMove={handleMouseMove}
          onMouseUp={handleMouseUp}
          onMouseLeave={handleMouseUp}
          initial={{ scale: 0.8, opacity: 0 }}
          animate={{ scale: 1, opacity: 1 }}
          transition={{ type: 'spring', stiffness: 300, damping: 30 }}
        />
      </motion.div>
    </AnimatePresence>
  );

  return createPortal(content, document.body);
}

```
